sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29396" key="dusperi/grafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσπερί-γρᾰφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29396.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to treat comprehensively</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πραγματεία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.78</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
